title: Ultra Photorealistic Extreme Close-Up Beauty Crop
sourceTitle: Ultra Photorealistic Extreme Close Up Beauty Crop
prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic extreme close-up beauty crop, vertical 4:5, framing the lower half of a young woman's face from just above the sunglasses down, shot outdoors in warm daylight. Flawless glowing sun-kissed skin with realistic texture and natural freckles scattered across the cheeks and nose, a soft dewy sheen. She wears slim black oval sunglasses with dark lenses that softly reflect green trees and sky. She is applying a warm brown lip liner pencil to full glossy lips in a soft caramel-brown nude shade, the pencil held up to the lips mid-application. Dark red glossy manicured nails, a slim hand. Chunky textured gold hoop earrings. Long dark hair framing the edges.
Lighting: warm natural sunlight from the front, soft golden glow on the skin, gentle shadows, fresh outdoor beauty mood, luminous and candid. Shot on a phone camera, macro detail, shallow depth of field, fine grain, realistic skin texture.
Negative: plastic skin, over-smoothed AI face, doll face, cartoon, 3D render, distorted hands, extra fingers, bad anatomy, dull skin, flat lighting, asymmetric lips, watermark, text, logo.
